title: Join AGM for George South Neighbourhood Watch
description: GEORGE NEWS - An official AGM will be held...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - An official AGM will be held to select a neighbourhood watch structure for George South on Wednesday 4 December.

During this meeting, the following positions will be voted in:

- Chairman
- Vice Chairman
- Operations Manager
- Secretary
- Treasurer

The Community Police Forum (CPF) will be present to record the proceedings formally.


> The meeting will start at 18:00 for 18:30 at the Dutch Reformed Church in George South.


A neighborhood watch (NHW) is fully dedicated to combating crime and serving the residents, without aligning with any political party. The NHW will remain "A" political (politically neutral ) and will only prioritise the safety and well-being of the community.

The following individuals are not eligible for official board membership:

- Anyone with ties to a political party or political agenda.
- Members of the South African Police Service (SAPS)
- Security guards employed by any security company.

"Your participation is crucial. We encourage as many George South residents as possible to attend the meeting. You have called for this change. Join us now in laying the foundation for the official NHW of George South, and let's work together to combat crime in our community," says CPF George member Timothy Luff.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
